basic_details.job_title: I4C Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 195 Office Assistant, Analyst and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Technical Professionals (Manager, Senior Consultant, Consultant, Analyst, Office Assistant)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Cyber Crime Coordination Centre (I4C) has officially announced a recruitment drive in 2026 for 195 Office Assistant, Analyst and More Posts on a contractual 3-year tenure basis. Eligible candidates across New Delhi & Assam with relevant qualifications and experience can apply online through M/s F-1 Infotech Private Limited. This recruitment covers multiple roles including Manager, Senior Consultant, Consultant, Analyst, and Office Assistant.

salary_details.pay_scale: Manager - 2.5 Lac Senior Consultant - 1.5 Lac Consultant - 1.2 Lac Analyst - 65,000 Office Assistant - 40,000

how_to_apply: Visit the official application portal: https://jobs.f1infotech.in/
Read the detailed recruitment notification carefully
Register with your email ID and mobile number
Fill in the online application form with accurate details
Upload all relevant documents and certificates
Submit the application before the last date: 19-05-2026
Take a printout for future reference

faq.question: Q1. How many total positions are available in I4C Recruitment 2026?
Q2. What is the tenure of engagement for these posts?
faq.answer: The posts are on a contractual basis for a 3-year tenure.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for the different posts?
faq.answer: Manager – 2.5 L, Senior Consultant – 1.5 L, Consultant – 1.2 L, Analyst – 65,000, Office Assistant – 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. Which locations are eligible for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for New Delhi and Assam locations.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply online?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online applications is 19 May 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Where can I submit my application?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online via the portal: https://jobs.f1infotech.in/

faq.question: Q7. Who can apply for these posts?
faq.answer: Qualified professionals with relevant experience and technical expertise in cybercrime, IT, or administrative domains can apply.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any reservation policy for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Reservation will be as per Government of India norms, if applicable.
